mapper.update: MERGE INTO USER_ACH_PROGRESS p USING DUAL ON (p.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND p.ACHIEVEMENT_ID = #{achievementId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET CURRENT_COUNT = CURRENT_COUNT + 1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MEMBER_ID, ACHIEVEMENT_ID, CURRENT_COUNT, IS_ACHIEVED) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{achievementId}, 1, 'N')
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM USER_ACH_PROGRESS WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND ACHIEVEMENT_ID = #{achievementId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_ACHIEVEMENT (MEMBER_ID, ACHIEVEMENT_ID, ACHIEVED_DATE) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{achievementId}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT m.EXP_POINT, m.TITLE_ID, t.TITLE_NAME, l.CURRENT_LV FROM MEMBER m LEFT JOIN TITLE t ON m.TITLE_ID = t.TITLE_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MAX(CURRENT_LV) as CURRENT_LV, #{memberId} as m_id FROM LEVEL_SYSTEM WHERE REQUIRED_EXP <= (SELECT NVL(EXP_POINT, 0) FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}) ) l ON m.MEMBER_ID = l.m_id WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USER_ACH_PROGRESS WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_ACHIEVED = 'Y'

SELECT a.ACHIEVEMENT_ID, a.ACH_TITLE, a.ACH_DESC, a.ACH_TYPE, a.CONDITION_COUNT, a.EXP_REWARD, NVL(p.CURRENT_COUNT, 0) as CURRENT_COUNT, NVL(p.IS_ACHIEVED, 'N') as IS_ACHIEVED, ua.ACHIEVED_DATE FROM ACHIEVEMENT a LEFT JOIN USER_ACH_PROGRESS p ON a.ACHIEVEMENT_ID = p.ACHIEVEMENT_ID AND p.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} LEFT JOIN USER_ACHIEVEMENT ua ON a.ACHIEVEMENT_ID = ua.ACHIEVEMENT_ID AND ua.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY a.ACHIEVEMENT_ID ASC
